findings.description: Section headings in PDF are underlined (e.g., 'ABOUT OUR AGENCY', 'ABOUT THE DIVISION') but in the HTML they are rendered as bold headings without underline styling.
findings.evidence: PDF shows underlined headings like 'ABOUT OUR AGENCY', 'ABOUT THE DIVISION'. HTML shows these as bold headings without underline.

findings.description: The title 'PFAS Data Synthesis Support Initiative 2022 - Raleigh, North Carolina' is underlined in the PDF but not underlined in the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF shows underlined title text. HTML shows the title without underline.

findings.description: Section headings 'MAJOR DUTIES', 'POSITION QUALIFICATIONS:', 'MANAGEMENT DESIRED QUALIFICATIONS', 'SPECIAL NOTES' are underlined in the PDF but not underlined in the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF has underlined section headings. HTML renders them as bold without underline.
